violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. Manager Food Safety certificates are current. FMC must re-instate. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Flavored cream cheeses packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Individual signs that include food identification and food ingredients discussed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The cutting boards on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2026
Piece on bagel shaper machine was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2026

The floors, shelving fixtures, fans and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of the slicer was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Bagel chips and flavored cream cheeses packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Individual signs that include food identification and food ingredients discussed with PIC; signs were actively being prepared during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. fan guards in walk-in cooler 2. grates by reach-in freezers 3. ice accumulation (on shelves in reach-in freezer) New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The floor near oven area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
